label: Auroraweld Stock Vault
description: Auroraweld Stock Vault serves as the atelier’s secured storage chamber, cut into the bastion’s vitrified stone and lined with grounded mesh to bleed off storm charge. Racked bays of sealed bins and plate cradles organize welding rod, flux canisters, replacement torch parts, and tagged salvage lengths under hooded lumen strips. Particulate baffles and gasketed vents keep ashfall from fouling stores, while the floor is set with drain channels for oil and coolant runoff. A bank of lockable vox-screens and dataslate brackets provides inventory control engineered to withstand Nocturnis Bastion’s constant interference.
